title: Immunocytochemistry Protocol
author: Yasmin Bar El
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.tqdems6

steps.instruction: 1. Wash the culture twice in a phosphate buffered saline (PBS); 2. Fix with 4% paraformaldehyde (Merck) for 10 min 00:10:00 , then put it in PBS until staining.
Wash fixed cultures three times with PBS (10 min 00:10:00 each).
Permeabilize with 0.5% triton X-100 (Sigma-Aldrich) in PBS for 10 min 00:10:00 .
Block with 2% BSA, 10% normal donkey serum, and 0.25% triton X-100 solution in PBS for 1 h 01:00:00 at room temperature.
Incubate overnight with rabbit anti-GFAP (1:400, Sigma-Aldrich, cat# G9269, RRID: AB_477035), mouse anti-NeuN (1:200, Millipore, cat# MAB377, RRID: AB_2298772) at 4 °C 4 °C .

Wash three times with PBS and incubated for 1 h 01:00:00 at room temperature with the appropriate secondary antibodies: Alexa fluor 488 goat anti-rabbit IgG (1:400, Jackson Laboratories) for the detection of GFAP and Cy-3 donkey anti-mouse IgG (1:700, Jackson Laboratories) for NeuN.
Mount with aqueous medium containing DAPI (VECTASHIELD Mounting Medium with DAPI, Vector Laboratories, H-1200).
